title: 04 Days Bale Mountains Tours
html:
Bale Mountain Tours

Mode of Transport: Surface and flight

Duration: 04 Days / 03 Nights

Day 01: Fly Addis – Goba

You will be transferred to the airport for your flight to Goba. Be met upon arrival and drive further to Harrena Forest. Overnight: Hotel.

Day 02: Excursion to Sanetti Plateau and Harrena Forest

Today you will have an excursion to Sanetti Plateau, the highest plateau in Africa. Here you may encounter the endemics of Ethiopia Wolf. Visit and proceed to Harrena Forest, the second dense forest in Ethiopia. Overnight: Hotel.

Day 03: Excursion to Sof Omar Cave

This day we will have an excursion to Sof Omar Cave, the longest cave in Ethiopia and the largest system of caves in Africa, through which the Weib River flows is 15kms long. Enjoy the magnificent nature and drive back to Goba. Overnight: Hotel.

Day 04: Fly Goba – Addis

You will be transferred to the airport for your flight back to Addis. Be met upon arrival and transferred to the place where you will be staying for the overnight. Overnight: Hotel.
